title: calceolaria fruticulosa
intro: Calceolaria fruticulosa, also known as the 'slipper flower', is a flowering plant native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria fruticulosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat colds, fever, and other minor ailments.
